posts.author: clara.aires (Clara Aires)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!
I need to create an excel report of our databank every week and therefore would like to know if:

  • there is a way to filter the columns in order to export only those informations into excel?
  • there is a way to export a dashboard and its widgets as graphics into excel?

Kind regards,
Clara

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @clara.aires! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
